blocks.text: Match preview: Nigeria Women face Malawi Women in 1st Match (T20) on Wed, 10 Jun, 2026, 1:15 pm at Gahanga B Ground Kigali City. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Overcast · High 27°C / Low 16°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 9 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
